name: csa-ppt
description: All-in-one presentation toolkit for Azure Cloud Solution Architects. Includes: csa-ppt (smart orchestrator), azure-diagrams (700+ Azure icons), excalidraw-diagram (hand-drawn style), frontend-slides (HTML presentations), pptx (OOXML PowerPoint), skywork-ppt (quick PPT generation). Covers customer demos, tech sharing, workshops, architecture reviews, and template filling.
